description: Knowledge layer de TaxiGuazú — datos estructurados de geo, ops, commercial y policies.

data/knowledge/geo/places.json.details: 36 places, ~125 aliases. AIT-030. Duplicado intencional 'cataratas argentinas' en Parque Nacional Iguazú (documentado con _note). Tipos: airport, hotel, park, landmark, neighborhood, shopping, customs, restaurant.

data/knowledge/geo/borders.json.details: 5 secciones (tancredoNeves, puenteAmistad, corredorTuristico, manifiesto, customsDuty), 25 items total. AIT-030.

data/knowledge/geo/attractions.json.details: 12 atracciones turísticas con precios, horarios y tips. AIT-030.

data/knowledge/ops/operations.json.details: 8 secciones (coordination, borderCrossing, pricing, tripTypes, communication, tips, driverAssistance, airportProtocol), 49 items total. AIT-031.

data/knowledge/ops/migration.json.details: 7 secciones (requiredDocs, qrInfo, minorsInfo, taxFreeInfo, insuranceInfo, eVisaInfo, byNationality), ~12 items total. AIT-031.

data/knowledge/ops/pricing-rules.json.details: 0 reglas activas. Array vacío — pricing se maneja desde DB (tablas promotions, provider_adjustments, packages). AIT-031.

data/knowledge/commercial/calendar.json.details: 5 secciones (lunaLlena, holidaysArgentina, holidaysBrasil, holidaysParaguay, seasons), 21 items total. 13 lunas llenas 2026. AIT-032 Fase A.

data/knowledge/commercial/surge-rules.js.details: 0 reglas activas. Ninguna definición de negocio. AIT-032 Fase A (Fase B diferida a FUT-07).

data/knowledge/policies/reserva.json.details: 4 policyHints, 4 thresholds, 12 decisionPriority levels, 2 adminNotifyTemplates. AIT-033.

data/knowledge/policies/escalation.json.details: 1 frustrationPattern, 1 adminEscalationTemplate, 2 llmPrompts, 2 guardMessages, 1 externalRefs (CONFIRMATION_TIMEOUT_S). AIT-033.
